title: LLM Statistics Configuration
description: Configuration for the LLM Statistics extension. Collects structured observability data for supported LLM API traffic.

metadata_namespace.description: Filter metadata namespace for LLM statistics fields. Defaults to "io.builtonenvoy.llm-statistics".

use_default_attributes.description: Emit the full built-in structured log payload.

use_default_response_attributes.description: Emit the default lightweight structured log payload.

session_id_header.description: Optional request header name used to extract a conversation or session ID.
